findings: Local LLM deployment is now a solved problem for enterprise in 2026 — Ollama remains the fastest path from zero to running models locally, with MLX enabling 70B models on Apple Silicon. The open-source AI model landscape has matured dramatically, making private zero-cost inference accessible without deep ML expertise (source: dev.to, groveai.io, earezki.com)

AI foot traffic analytics has evolved into AI-powered sensors that track foot traffic, measure conversion rates, and generate heatmaps while maintaining customer privacy — combining computer vision with IoT for customer path analysis and dwell time insights (source: v-count.com, zediot.com, loook.ai)

OpenClaw community confirms Kimi K25 as a top AI model choice for the platform, and security hardening skills built with Claude are gaining traction on r/openclaw for remote server deployments (source: reddit.com/r/openclaw)
